title: Knots, Links and Their Invariants
pdfs: Knots, Links and Their Invariants, An Elementary Course in Contemporary Knot Theory.pdf

units.title: Knots and Links, Reidemeister Moves
units.focus: Knot and link diagrams, Reidemeister moves, torus knots, invertibility, and chirality.
units.label: Lecture 1

units.title: The Conway Polynomial
units.focus: Axiomatic Conway polynomial, skein calculations, uniqueness, existence, chirality, orientation reversal, and multiplicativity.
units.label: Lecture 2

units.title: The Arithmetic of Knots
units.focus: Boxed knots, connected sum, knot semigroup, prime decomposition, and unknotting remarks.
units.label: Lecture 3

units.title: Some Simple Knot Invariants
units.focus: Stick number, crossing number, unknotting number, tricolorability, orientable surfaces, Seifert surfaces, and genus.
units.label: Lecture 4

units.title: The Kauffman Bracket
units.focus: States of knot diagrams, Kauffman bracket definition and properties, and invariance defects.
units.label: Lecture 5

units.title: The Jones Polynomial
units.focus: Jones polynomial via Kauffman bracket, axioms, multiplicativity, chirality, reversibility, and knot tables.
units.label: Lecture 6

units.title: Braids
units.focus: Geometric braids, braid groups, group presentations, Artin presentation, closures, and undecidability digression.
units.label: Lecture 7

units.title: Discriminants and Finite Type Invariants
units.focus: Quadratic discriminants, degree of point relative to curve, inertia index, and Gauss linking number.
units.label: Lecture 8

units.title: Vassiliev Invariants
units.focus: Singular knots, one-term and four-term relations, spaces of invariants, chord diagrams, and low-order examples.
units.label: Lecture 9

units.title: Combinatorial Description of Vassiliev Invariants
units.focus: Graded algebras, chord diagram algebra, Vassiliev-Kontsevich theorem, and comparison with other invariants.
units.label: Lecture 10

units.title: The Kontsevich Integrals
units.focus: Kontsevich integral for trefoil, configuration-space integral intuition, and finite type invariant encoding.
units.label: Lecture 11

units.title: Other Important Topics
units.focus: Further knot-theoretic topics and relationships among invariants and constructions.
units.label: Lecture 12

units.title: A Brief History of Knot Theory
units.focus: Historical development, invariant milestones, and conceptual map of contemporary knot theory.
units.label: Lecture 13
